perturbation.original_text: 4. UNDERTAKING OF CONFIDENTIALITY 4.1 The Buyer undertakes , towards and in favour of each of Aldes, the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally) , with regard to and in respect of any and all of the Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, that it will keep same (irrespective of how same was disclosed to the Buyer ) strictly confidential and secret and that it will hold same in absolute trust and confidence . _______________ Initial BUYER ’S CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT 4.2 The Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall retain ownership of all their Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, which shall be deemed to be lent to the Buyer for the Purpose only. 5. LIABILITY 5.1 The Buyer acknowledges that it will be liable , responsible and accountable to each of Aldes , the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally) for a breach of this Agreement by itself or any of its related or inter related parties, employees, consultants, ad visers and/or agents.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. UNDERTAKING OF CONFIDENTIALITY 4.1 The Buyer undertakes , towards and in favour of each of Aldes, the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally) , with regard to and in respect of any and all of the Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, that it will keep same (irrespective of how same was disclosed to the Buyer ) strictly confidential and secret and that it will hold same in absolute trust and confidence; provided, however, that the Buyer shall be entitled to disclose such Confidential Information to its financial advisors and legal counsel, as necessary. _______________ Initial BUYER ’S CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT 4.2 The Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall retain ownership of all their Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, which shall be deemed to be lent to the Buyer for the Purpose only. 5. LIABILITY 5.1 The Buyer acknowledges that it will be liable , responsible and accountable to each of Aldes , the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally) for a breach of this Agreement by itself or any of its related or inter related parties, employees, consultants, ad visers and/or agents.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction. The original clause in 4.1 stated that the buyer will hold the confidentiality in 'absolute trust and confidence' but the added text states 'the Buyer shall be entitled to disclose such Confidential Information to its financial advisors and legal counsel, as necessary.' Which breaks that trust with the original seller.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. UNDERTAKING OF CONFIDENTIALITY 4.1 The Buyer undertakes , towards and in favour of each of Aldes, the Business/es and the Seller/s (jointly and severally) , with regard to and in respect of any and all of the Confidential Information and/or Confidential Materials, that it will keep same (irrespective of how same was disclosed to the Buyer ) strictly confidential and secret and that it will hold same in absolute trust and confidence; provided, however, that the Buyer shall be entitled to disclose such Confidential Information to its financial advisors and legal counsel, as necessary.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a contradiction. The original text states that the Buyer will hold Confidential Information in 'absolute trust and confidence'. The addition of 'provided, however, that the Buyer shall be entitled to disclose such Confidential Information to its financial advisors and legal counsel, as necessary' directly contradicts the 'absolute trust and confidence' clause. The contradicted text is the same location in the text, therefore the change is the only difference.

perturbation.original_text: 6. NON -CIRCUMVENT 6.1 The Buyer acknowledges that Aldes will be deemed and regarded (and will be) the effective cause of any transaction which may transpire and/or materialise between the Buyer and any Business/es and/or Seller/s . 6.2 The Buyer warrants and guarantees that it will never circumvent Aldes (albeit directly itself or indirectly through any of its subsidiaries, holding companies, group companies, related parties and/or inter -related parties or otherwise indirectly ), in negot iating or concluding any transactions , arrangements and/or agreements contemplated in clauses 2.1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Seller/s and/or Business /es. For avoidance of doubt, the Buyer will at all times act in good faith and will only transact and deal with Seller/s and/or Business/es, via the brokerage , intervention and mediation of Aldes. 6.3 The Buyer acknowledges and agrees that Aldes is, will be an d will remain entitled to receipt of its agreed brokerage commission (albeit due and payable by the Seller/s, the Business/es, the Buyer or any of them ), should the Buyer (albeit directly itself or indirectly t hrough any of its subsidiaries , holding c ompan ies, group c ompanies , related parties and/or inter -related parties or otherwise indirectly) or anyone else the Buyer may have introduced to the Business/es and/or Seller/s , conclude any agreements and/or transactions contemplated in clause s 2.1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Business/es and/or Seller/s .
perturbation.changed_text: 6. NON -CIRCUMVENT 6.1 The Buyer acknowledges that Aldes will be deemed and regarded (and will be) the effective cause of any transaction which may transpire and/or materialise between the Buyer and any Business/es and/or Seller/s . 6.2 The Buyer warrants and guarantees that it will never circumvent Aldes (albeit directly itself or indirectly through any of its subsidiaries, holding companies, group companies, related parties and/or inter -related parties or otherwise indirectly ), in negot iating or concluding any transactions , arrangements and/or agreements contemplated in clauses 2.1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Seller/s and/or Business /es. For avoidance of doubt, the Buyer will at all times act in good faith and will only transact and deal with Seller/s and/or Business/es, via the brokerage , intervention and mediation of Aldes, unless the seller actively solicits direct contact with the buyer after the initial introduction by Aldes. 6.3 The Buyer acknowledges and agrees that Aldes is, will be an d will remain entitled to receipt of its agreed brokerage commission (albeit due and payable by the Seller/s, the Business/es, the Buyer or any of them ), should the Buyer (albeit directly itself or indirectly t hrough any of its subsidiaries , holding c ompan ies, group c ompanies , related parties and/or inter -related parties or otherwise indirectly) or anyone else the Buyer may have introduced to the Business/es and/or Seller/s , conclude any agreements and/or transactions contemplated in clause s 2.1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Business/es and/or Seller/s .
perturbation.explanation: The modified text adds an exception to the non-circumvent clause. Originally, 6.2 guaranteed that the buyer will only transact through Aldes but, the change introduces a condition 'unless the seller actively solicits direct contact with the buyer after the initial introduction by Aldes'. Which contradicts the original guarantee that the buyer will never circumvent.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 6. NON -CIRCUMVENT 6.2 The Buyer warrants and guarantees that it will never circumvent Aldes (albeit directly itself or indirectly through any of its subsidiaries, holding companies, group companies, related parties and/or inter -related parties or otherwise indirectly ), in negot iating or concluding any transactions , arrangements and/or agreements contemplated in clauses 2.1 and/or 2.2 above with (or with regard to) any Seller/s and/or Business /es. For avoidance of doubt, the Buyer will at all times act in good faith and will only transact and deal with Seller/s and/or Business/es, via the brokerage , intervention and mediation of Aldes, unless the seller actively solicits direct contact with the buyer after the initial introduction by Aldes.
perturbation.justification: The original text in section 6.2 guarantees that the buyer will 'never circumvent Aldes' and 'will only transact and deal with Seller/s and/or Business/es, via the brokerage , intervention and mediation of Aldes'. The changed text adds 'unless the seller actively solicits direct contact with the buyer after the initial introduction by Aldes.' This creates a direct contradiction to the original guarantee, because it introduces an exception where the buyer *can* circumvent Aldes, which is directly contradictory and breaks the non-circumvent clause as previously guaranteed. This makes the changed text and contradicted text incompatible, leading to a strong in-text contradiction. The Contradicted Text is Section 6.2, as highlighted in the prompt.

perturbation.original_text: 7. GENERAL 7.1 No alteration or variation to or of this Agreement shall be of any force or effect unless it is recorded in writing and signed by the Buyer and Aldes . 7.2 Any indulgence, latitude or extension of time which may be allowed by either of Aldes, the Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall not under any circumstances be taken as preventing any of them from exercising their rights contained in this Agreement .
perturbation.changed_text: 7. GENERAL 7.1 No alteration or variation to or of this Agreement shall be of any force or effect unless it is recorded in writing and signed by the Buyer and Aldes, except that Aldes may unilaterally amend the agreement by providing written notice to the Buyer. 7.2 Any indulgence, latitude or extension of time which may be allowed by either of Aldes, the Seller/s and/or the Business/es shall not under any circumstances be taken as preventing any of them from exercising their rights contained in this Agreement .
perturbation.explanation: The original clause in 7.1 stated that no alteration or variation shall be in effect unless its signed by the buyer and aldes. The modified text changes this allowing 'Aldes may unilaterally amend the agreement by providing written notice to the Buyer.' This new change goes against the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 7. GENERAL 7.1 No alteration or variation to or of this Agreement shall be of any force or effect unless it is recorded in writing and signed by the Buyer and Aldes, except that Aldes may unilaterally amend the agreement by providing written notice to the Buyer.
perturbation.justification: The original text states that all alterations must be signed by both parties. The changed text allows Aldes to unilaterally amend the agreement, directly contradicting the initial requirement for mutual agreement on all changes. The contradicted text is the same location as the changed text. The explanation correctly points out the change allows Aldes to change the original clause stating it needs to be signed by both parties.

perturbation.original_text: 8. BUYER’ S INFORMATION 8.1 The Buyer notes that Aldes’ decision to introduce any Business/es for sale to the Buyer (and the Seller/s and/or Business/es decision to enter into discussions with the Buyer) is, in part, based on the information presented by the Buyer under and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile on the face of this Agreement. As such, the Buyer warrants and guarantees that all information presented and p rovided via and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile was, is and will remain true, complete and accurate and that it will immediately inform Aldes should there be any change in t he information provided/presented.
perturbation.changed_text: 8. BUYER’ S INFORMATION 8.1 The Buyer notes that Aldes’ decision to introduce any Business/es for sale to the Buyer (and the Seller/s and/or Business/es decision to enter into discussions with the Buyer) is, in part, based on the information presented by the Buyer under and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile on the face of this Agreement. As such, the Buyer warrants and guarantees that all information presented and p rovided via and in terms of the Buyer’s Profile was, is and will remain true, complete and accurate. The Buyer is not obligated to inform Aldes should there be any change in the information provided/presented.

But the modified text states 'The Buyer is not obligated to inform Aldes should there be any change in the information provided/presented.' This directly contradicts that clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 8. perturbation.original_text: 9. FURTHER CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENTS 9.1 Aldes may from time to time, depend ant on the nature, scope and extent of information to be provided to the Buyer, require that the Buyer enter into and conclude further and/or additional confidentiality and non -disclosure agreements. Should the Buyer fail and/or refuse to enter into and co nclude such further agreements, Aldes may, in its sole and absolute discretion, refuse to disclose further information to the Buyer regarding any and/or all Seller/s and/or Business/es. 9.2 It is noted and agreed that the Buyer and certain of the Seller/s and/or Business/es may from time to time enter into an d conclude one or more confidentiality and/or non -disclosure agreements amongst, by and between themselves. It is noted and agreed that those agreements will be in addition to, and not in substitution o f/for, this Agreement. Those Agreements will in no way, manner or form detract from, limit , terminate and/or negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement, unless Aldes has given its specific prior written consent to the contrary.
perturbation.changed_text: 9. FURTHER CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENTS 9.1 Aldes may from time to time, depend ant on the nature, scope and extent of information to be provided to the Buyer, require that the Buyer enter into and conclude further and/or additional confidentiality and non -disclosure agreements. Should the Buyer fail and/or refuse to enter into and co nclude such further agreements, Aldes may, in its sole and absolute discretion, refuse to disclose further information to the Buyer regarding any and/or all Seller/s and/or Business/es. 9.2 It is noted and agreed that the Buyer and certain of the Seller/s and/or Business/es may from time to time enter into an d conclude one or more confidentiality and/or non -disclosure agreements amongst, by and between themselves. It is noted and agreed that those agreements will be in addition to, and not in substitution o f/for, this Agreement. Those Agreements will supersede and negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: In this example, the original clause in 9.2 stated that 'Those Agreements will in no way, manner or form detract from, limit , terminate and/or negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement, unless Aldes has given its specific prior written consent to the contrary'. The modified text says 'Those Agreements will supersede and negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement'. Directly contradicting itself.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 9. FURTHER CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON -DISCLOSURE AGREEMENTS 9.2 It is noted and agreed that the Buyer and certain of the Seller/s and/or Business/es may from time to time enter into an d conclude one or more confidentiality and/or non -disclosure agreements amongst, by and between themselves. It is noted and agreed that those agreements will be in addition to, and not in substitution o f/for, this Agreement. Those Agreements will supersede and negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text in section 9.2 stated that further agreements will 'in no way, manner or form detract from, limit , terminate and/or negate any of the terms, conditions a nd provisions of this Agreement, unless Aldes has given its specific prior written consent to the contrary'. The changed text modifies this to say 'Those Agreements will supersede and negate any of the terms, conditions and provisions of this Agreement'. This creates a direct contradiction as one section states the agreements will not negate the original agreement while the other states it will supersede it, making it inconsistent and unenforceable per the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction.
